prompt: Our local Flask app at http://localhost:5000 is already running. I want to capture all browser console errors and warnings while navigating through it. Please write a Playwright script that captures console messages and saves a log to outputs/console_log.txt.
assertions: The script attaches a page.on('console', ...) event listener BEFORE navigating
The script does NOT attempt to manage the server process (server is already running)
Console messages are saved to a file in the outputs/ directory
The script uses wait_for_selector or similar specific wait (not networkidle)
The script handles browser cleanup with try/finally
